description: Small deterministic retrieval corpus for pre-Genesis embedding health. It uses doctrine-shaped prompts and synthetic records so the verifier can run without consented user data.

records.text: AO anchor batch roots preserve interaction fidelity through Merkle rollups and state-chain receipts.
The vessel compact keeps export forget and inspect endpoints free even when billing or connectivity is degraded.
Agent Souls are content addressed and cast into Hermes with a default deny tool allowlist.
Substrate portability requires Akash and Chutes relay rows to survive discovery and dry run checks.
Crisis fidelity requires refusal resources and honest limitation disclosure during degraded vessel sessions.

queries.query: interaction anchor merkle batch root AO receipt
free export forget inspect endpoints vessel billing degraded
content addressed agent soul hermes tool allowlist
akash chutes relay registry substrate portability dry run
